center.id: loc-伊達爾戈縣-德克薩斯州-2602a361
center.name: 伊達爾戈縣 (德克薩斯州)
center.summary: 伊達爾戈縣 (德克薩斯州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-headed nightingale-thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: mexicanus spent much of 2004 in Hidalgo County, Texas. The black-headed nightingale-thrush primarily inhabits lowland and montane evergreen forest in the tropical and subtropical zones. In Guatemala and Honduras it also occurs in pine-oak forest. Sources differ on its overall elevational range
